summary: Testing Soul Knowledge Ticker and Proactive Alert slide-down animation. Backend API verified with 14/14 pytest tests passing. Frontend Playwright testing could not proceed due to browser crashes on /mira-demo page (known issue). Code review confirms implementation is correct.

integration_issues.issue: Playwright browser crashes when navigating to /mira-demo page - Target crashed error. This is a known issue mentioned in the review request.
affected_selectors: N/A - page crashes before selectors can be checked

critical_code_review_comments: SoulKnowledgeTicker.jsx (lines 1-584) correctly implements: data-testid='soul-knowledge-ticker', data-testid='soul-score-badge', data-testid='ticker-item-{index}', data-testid='soul-knowledge-expanded'
ProactiveAlertsBanner.jsx (lines 154-220) correctly implements slideDownReveal CSS animation with @keyframes at 0.25s ease-out
MiraDemoPage.jsx (lines 3282-3337) correctly integrates SoulKnowledgeTicker with petId, petName, soulScore, knowledgeItems, and apiUrl props
Backend /api/mira/personalization-stats/{pet_id} (lines 11770-12026) correctly returns: success, soul_score, knowledge_items array, stats array, pet_name, encourage_soul_completion

success_rate.frontend: Unable to test - browser crashes on /mira-demo page

context_for_next_testing_agent: Browser automation crashes on /mira-demo page. Backend API is fully working - personalization-stats returns 16 knowledge items including soul score, favorites, personality, breed, and memories. Code review confirms SoulKnowledgeTicker and ProactiveAlertsBanner with slide-down animation are correctly implemented.

features: Soul score badge with glow animation
